MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER to CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-10-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Cross-complainant Vicente Rodriguez's motion to strike the answer of cross-defendant Atlas Painting Company, Inc. and enter the default of Atlas Painting Company, Inc. is denied.

Mr. Rodriguez has not shown that Atlas Painting was served with the moving papers. The proof of service states only that plaintiffs were served.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/HEK)

MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER to CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-04-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT VICENTE RODRIGUEZ DOING BUSINESS AS OAKLEY DESIGN + BUILD & RESTORATION's MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER to CROSS COMPLAINT.

Defendant and Cross-complainant Vincente Rodriguez's unopposed motion to strike Atlas Painting Company, Inc.'s Answer to Cross-complaint is DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE.

The motion is infirm in several respects. First, Moving party failed to provide a courtesy copy of the Constantino Declaration, which, buy itself, is grounds to order the motion off calendar. (See L.R.S.F., rule 2.7(b).)

(see word minutes for full details)

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and drop a hard paper copy in Dept. 302's inbox for the court's review and signature.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
